title: Hold Point
description: One hold point — a hard stop in the programme. Work does not proceed until the precondition is met and the evidence is on site. WHS hold points are distinct from QA / ITP release points and must be labelled.

ref.description: HP-01, HP-02, ... Unique across the schedule.

source_pattern_id.description: Source pattern ID from knowledge/hold_point_patterns.json used to instantiate this project hold point.

status.description: Operational status for confirmed, conditional, pre-mobilisation, pre-task, SWMS-update or stop-work hold points.

title.description: Short name of the hold point (e.g. 'Tilt-up lift study reviewed before first panel lift').

packages.description: Packages this hold point applies to. Each must match a package name used elsewhere in the set.

precondition.description: The condition that must be met before proceeding. Should read as a verifiable 'do not proceed until X' statement.

release_criteria.description: Specific criteria that must be satisfied before the hold point is released.

release_authority.description: Role or person authorised to release the hold point.

authority_roles.description: Role(s) with actual authority to release. Engineers release engineering matters only (lift studies, temporary works, erection sequence, brace removal, ground bearing, structural release).

authority_text.description: Verbatim sign-off authority wording as it appears in the cell (e.g. 'Structural engineer + SD Group Site Manager').

evidence_required.description: The record that must be on site (signed inspection record, written engineer authorisation, test certificate, completed checklist).

release_type.description: WHS hold point vs QA / ITP release point. Must be labelled — they are not interchangeable.

engineering_release.description: True where release depends on an engineering judgement (loading, access, temporary works, structural release). Used by the risk validator to confirm structural loading/access risks have an engineer-release condition.

linked_confirmation_item_refs.description: Confirmation item IDs linked to this hold point.

linked_supporting_document_refs.description: Supporting document IDs linked to this hold point.
